# Name: Bug Report
About: Report a crash or unexpected behavior in Zombie Infection.

#Environment
Minecraft Version: 1.21.1
NeoForge Version: (e.g., 21.1.219)
Mod Version: (e.g., 1.0.0)
Other Relevant Mods: (e.g., GeckoLib, Architectury, etc.)

# Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is. If this happened during mod loading (initialization), please specify.

# Steps to Reproduce
Start the game with [X] mods installed.
Click on [Y].
Trigger the [Z] event
See error.

# Logs / Crash Reports
IMPORTANT: Please provide a link to the full crash report or latest.log.
Use Pastebin or mclo.gs to upload your log and paste the link below.

# Link to log:

# Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

# Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here.
